Spells-Ranger — Female Human Ranger: 10
Strength: 15 (+2) Dexterity: 10 (+0) Constitution: 12 (+1) Intelligence: 13 (+1) Wisdom: 14 (+2) Charisma: 11 (+0)
Background: Soldier Alignment: Chaotic Neutral Deity: Norse-Njord (NG)
Ability Boosts: Constitution; Intelligence; Strength Experience: 83171/85000 Level: 10 Size: Medium Speed: 40 Carry/Lift: 225/450
Ability Notes:
Roving: +10 Speed; heavy armor negates
Ability Boosts: 3 to distribute
Roving: Has 40' climb and swim Speeds
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +4
Feat Count: General: 2; Origin: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Ranger (Ranger Fighting Style); Ranger (Ranger Subclass)
Feats: Archery; Magic Initiate (Druid); Skilled Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Ranger Features: Armor Training (Light; Medium; Shield); Defensive Tactics; Deft Explorer; Druidic Warrior; Expertise; Extra Attack; Favored Enemy; Hunter's Lore; Hunter's Prey; Hunter; Ranger Fighting Style; Ranger Subclass; Roving; Save Proficiency (Strength; Dexterity); Skill Proficiency (Choose 3 from Animal Handling, Athletics, Insight, Investigation, Nature, Perception, Stealth, Survival); Spellcasting; Tireless; Weapon Mastery; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Martial Weapons) Soldier Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Strength, Dexterity, Constitution); Savage Attacker; Skill Proficiency (Athletics; Intimidation); Tool Proficiency (Choose 1 from any Gaming)
Feature Notes:
Ranger Fighting Style: 1 selection
Ranger Subclass: 1 selection
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Skill Proficiency: Athletics; Insight; Intimidation; Medicine; Perception; Persuasion; Stealth; Survival
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +0 Insight: (wis) +6 Performance: (cha) +0
Animal Handling: (wis) +2 Intimidation: (cha) +4 Persuasion: (cha) +4
Arcana: (int) +1 Investigation: (int) +1 Religion: (int) +1
Athletics: (str) +6 Medicine: (wis) +6 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +0
Deception: (cha) +0 Nature: (int) +1 Stealth: (dex) +4
History: (int) +1 Perception: (wis) +6 Survival: (wis) +6
Tool Proficiency: Dragonchess Set: (wis)
Languages: Dwarvish; Undercommon
Skill Notes:
Deft Explorer: Language (Choose 2 from any)
Skilled: Skill Proficiency (Choose 3 from any)
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Bulky Armor: Has disadvantage on Stealth
Deft Explorer: +4 on a choice of proficient skill
Expertise: +4 on 2 chosen proficient skills
Combat
Hit Points: 47 Initiative: +0 Armor Class: 15 Attacks Per Round: 2
Armor Training: Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: Half Plate Shield: None Weapons: Hand Crossbow (+4 1d6 P R30/120); Handaxe (+6 1d6+2 S R20/60); Unarmed (+6 1+2 B); War Pick (+6 1d8+2 P [2h d10])
Combat Notes:
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +10
Defensive Tactics: Has the Escape The Horde and Multiattack Defense features
Extra Attack: +1 Attacks Per Round
Hunter's Prey: Has the Colossus Slayer and Horde Breaker features
Strength Attack Adjustment: +2
Strength Damage Adjustment: +2
Archery: +2 ranged attacks
Colossus Slayer: Can inflict +1d8 HP with a weapon vs. an already-injured foe once per turn
Defensive Tactics: Can choose Escape The Horde or Multiattack Defense to be active after each rest
Escape The Horde: Foes have disadvantage on opportunity attacks targeting self
Horde Breaker: Can make a second weapon attack on a different adjacent foe once per turn
Hunter's Lore: Knows any immunities, resistances, or vulnerabilities of a Hunter's Mark target
Hunter's Prey: Can choose to have Colossus Slayer or Horde Breaker active after each rest
Multiattack Defense: Successful attackers suffer disadvantage on additional attacks on self in the same turn
Savage Attacker: Can use the better of 2 damage rolls once per turn
Tireless: Can use an action to gain 1d8+2 temporary hit points 2 times per long rest
Weapon Mastery: Can use the mastery properties of 2 chosen Simple or Martial Melee weapons
Save Proficiency: Dexterity; Strength
Save: Charisma: +0; Constitution: +1; Dexterity: +4; Intelligence: +1; Strength: +6; Wisdom: +2
Save Notes: Tireless: Exhaustion level decreases by 1 after a short rest
Magic
Spell Slots: D0: 2; R1: 4; R2: 3; R3: 2 Attack: D: 6; R: 6 Spell DC: D: 14; R: 14
Spells:
Aid (R2 Abju): R30' 3 targets gain +5 hit points for 8 hr [+Level gives +5 temporary hit points]
Alarm (R1 Abju): R30' Entry into a 20' cube by a non-designated Tiny or larger creature triggers an audible or mental alarm for 8 hr [R]
Animal Friendship (R1 Ench): R30' Convinces target beast that self is harmless (save Wisdom negates; Intelligence 4 or higher immune) for 24 hr or until harmed [+Level affects +1 target]
Animal Messenger (R2 Ench): R30' Tiny beast target moves (save Charisma negates; CR greater than 0 automatically succeeds) to deliver a 25-word message to a described recipient for 24 hr [+Level extends the duration +48 hr] [R]
Barkskin (R2 Tran): Willing touched gains Armor Class 16 for concentration up to 1 hr
Commune With Nature (R5 Divi): Reveals 3 facts about nature within 3 miles, or within 300' when underground [R]
Conjure Animals (R3 Conj): R60' 10' radius inflicts 3d10 HP slashing (save Dexterity negates), and 5' radius gives self advantage on Strength saves, for concentration up to 10 min; can be moved 30' each turn [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Conjure Woodland Beings (R4 Conj): 10' emanation inflicts 5d8 HP force (save Wisdom half) and allows self to use a bonus action to Disengage for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Cure Wounds (R1 Abju): Touched regains 2d8+2 hit points [+Level restores +2d8 HP]
Darkvision (R2 Tran): Willing touched sees 150' in darkness for 8 hr
Daylight (R3 Evoc): R60' Target centers a 60' radius bright light for 1 hr
Detect Magic (R1 Divi): R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min [R]
Detect Poison And Disease (R1 Divi): R30' Reveals poison, poisonous creatures, and magical contagions for concentration up to 10 min [R]
Dispel Magic (R3 Abju): R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell [+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level]
Dominate Beast (R4 Ench): R60' Target beast obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level extends the duration to 10 min, 1 hr, or 8 hr at level 5, 6, or 7]
Enhance Ability (R2 Tran): Touched gains advantage on chosen ability checks for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Ensnaring Strike (R1 Conj): Next successful self attack restrains the foe and inflicts 1d6 HP per rd piercing (save Athletics ends; Large creatures have advantage on the save) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Entangle (R1 Conj): R90' 20' sq ensnares creatures (save Strength negates; Athletics ends) for concentration up to 1 min
Find Traps (R2 Divi): R120' Reveals the presence of traps
Fog Cloud (R1 Conj): R120' 20' radius obscures vision for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level increases the radius by 20']
Freedom Of Movement (R4 Abju): Touched gains immunity to movement impediments and a 40 swim Speed and can escape from nonmagical restraints for 1 hr
Goodberry (R1 Conj): Creates 10 berries that each heal 1 hit point and provide food for 1 day
Greater Restoration (R5 Abju): Touched recovers from exhausted, charmed, petrified, cursed, or ability reduction or regains hit point maximum
Gust Of Wind (R2 Evoc): 60'x10' wind pushes 15' (save Strength negates), inflicts half movement, disperses gas and vapor, and extinguishes flames (50% chance for protected flames) for concentration up to 1 min
Hunter's Mark (R1 Divi): R90' Self inflicts +1d6 HP force on the target and gains advantage on Perception and Wisdom to locate it for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level extends the duration to 8 or 24 hr at level 3 or 5]
Hunter's Mark (R1 [Favored Enemy] Divi): R90' Self inflicts +1d6 HP force on the target and gains advantage on Perception and Wisdom to locate it for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level extends the duration to 8 or 24 hr at level 3 or 5]
Jump (R1 Tran): Touched gains 30' jump after a 10' move for 1 min
Lesser Restoration (R2 Abju): Touched recovers from a choice of blindness, deafness, paralysis, or poison
Locate Animals Or Plants (R2 Divi): Reveals the location within 5 miles of a specified kind of beast or plant [R]
Locate Creature (R4 Divi): Reveals the location of a specified creature or species within 1000' for concentration up to 1 hr; lead blocks the spell
Locate Object (R2 Divi): Reveals the location of a specified object or type within 1000' for concentration up to 10 min; lead blocks the spell
Longstrider (R1 Tran): Touched gains +10' Speed for 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Magic Weapon (R2 Tran): Gives touched weapon a +1 magic bonus for 1 hr [+Level gives a +2 or +3 bonus at level 3 or 6]
Meld Into Stone (R3 Tran): Self steps into rock, losing sight and muffling hearing but allowing casting spells on self, for up to 8 hr [R]
Mending (D0 Tran): Touch repairs a break or tear up to 1'
Message (D0 Tran): R120' Self and target can hold a whispered conversation for 1 rd
Nondetection (R3 Abju): Willing touched or touched object gains immunity to divination for 8 hr
Pass Without Trace (R2 Abju): Targets in a 30' radius gain +10 Stealth and leave no tracks for concentration up to 1 hr
Plant Growth (R3 Tran): R150' Causes plants in a 100' radius to overgrow, slowing movement to 1/4 Speed, or enriches a 1/2 mile radius for 365 days
Protection From Energy (R3 Abju): Touched gains resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder damage for concentration up to 1 hr
Protection From Poison (R2 Abju): Touched recovers from poisoned condition and gains advantage on saves vs. being poisoned and resistance to poison for 1 hr
Revivify (R3 Necr): Restores life and 1 hit point to a touched 1-minute-old corpse
Silence (R2 Illu): R120' 20' radius blocks sound for concentration up to 10 min [R]
Speak With Animals (R1 Divi): Self can talk with animals for 10 min [R]
Speak With Plants (R3 Tran): Self can talk with and command plants for 10 min
Spike Growth (R2 Tran): R150' 20' radius becomes difficult terrain and inflicts 2d4 HP piercing per 5' movement for concentration up to 10 min
Stoneskin (R4 Tran): Touched gains resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage for concentration up to 1 hr
Tree Stride (R5 Conj): Allows self to teleport 500' between like trees once per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Water Breathing (R3 Tran): R30' 10 targets can breathe underwater for 24 hr [R]
Water Walk (R3 Tran): R30' 10 targets can traverse liquids for 1 hr [R]
Wind Wall (R3 Evoc): R120' Creates a 50'x15'x1' area that inflicts 4d8 HP bludgeoning (save Strength half) and deflects lightweight creatures, objects, and projectiles for concentration up to 1 min
Magic Notes:
Druidic Warrior: Knows 2 Druid cantrips; can replace 1 of them when gaining a Ranger level
Favored Enemy: Can cast Hunter's Mark 4 times per long rest
Magic Initiate (Druid): Knows 2 Druid cantrips and can cast a chosen D1 spell once per long rest
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the ranger spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual
